title: IC 1-1-1-4 - Invalid statutes
text:
IC 1-1-1-4
Invalid statutes
Sec. 4. Invalid Statutes. Notwithstanding the inclusion in the Indiana Code of statutory
provisions declared impliedly repealed, unconstitutional or otherwise invalid by a court of
competent jurisdiction, those provisions have only such force as they had before the
enactment of the Indiana Code.
